title: dactylorhiza × estonica
intro: Dactylorhiza × estonica, a hybrid orchid species, is a result of the cross between Dactylorhiza fuchsii and Dactylorhiza ischnea. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × estonica include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory problems, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
